sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M5] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Preconditioning test," White Paper, 2018, p. 15.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the executable reference for start-of-test stabilization before formal characterization.
Keep the 3-cycle minimum, 2% stability gate, and 10-cycle cap visible in any plan.
